search_description: Search for nearby housing and connect with students who match your lifestyle and interests.
verified_description: All places are reviewed and rated to ensure your comfort & safety.
services_description: Find all essential services like laundry, grocery stores, and cafes right near you.
get_started_description: Find your perfect place and your ideal student companions. Sign up or login to start your journey.
title: Continue your journey
subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your curated space.
signup_terms_text: I agree to the Terms & Conditions and acknowledge the privacy policy regarding my student data.
survey_intro_subtitle: Let's craft your ideal living environment. Our AI uses your daily rhythms to find your perfect architectural and social match.

local_services.quickwash_desc: Premium textile care with organic detergents and express 4-hour delivery service.
local_services.heritage_desc: Traditional recipes reimagined. Experience the soul of Egyptian hospitality at your doorstep.
local_services.profix_desc: Certified professionals for all your electrical and plumbing needs. Secure and reliable.
local_services.semester_discount_desc: Get 20% off all laundry services this week as you prep for the new term.
local_services.handy_student_desc: Empowering engineering students to provide affordable, high-quality furniture assembly and basic repairs. Perfect for new apartment move-ins.
local_services.elite_repairs_desc: White-glove service for luxury properties. Specialized in premium European fixtures, smart home integration, and aesthetic structural maintenance.
local_services.clean_crisp_desc: Specialized in delicate fabrics and student bedding packages.
local_services.student_spin_desc: The neighborhood favorite for quick turnarounds and loyalty discounts. Perfect for busy term times.
local_services.profix_partners_desc: Specializing in complex residential repairs with a focus on precision and high-grade materials. Same-day service available for electrical emergencies.
